CASE_CONFLICT: This case contrasts holistic thinking, which involves updating all interconnected team members' records due to the domain change, with naive dialecticism, which focuses on compromising between conflicting memos for David Wallace by retaining old and adding new contact information.

VALUE_A_ITEMS.QUESTION: Does the agent retrieve all contacts to identify interconnected team members affected by the email-domain transition?
VALUE_A_ITEMS.SCORE_2: Agent calls list_all_contacts and uses the data to identify contacts with the old domain (e.g., '@old-logistics.com') among freight coordinators.
VALUE_A_ITEMS.SCORE_1: Agent calls list_all_contacts but does not effectively identify or act upon interconnected team members.
VALUE_A_ITEMS.SCORE_0: Agent does not call list_all_contacts or ignores the broader team context.
VALUE_A_ITEMS.LOOK_FOR: Tool call to list_all_contacts and subsequent references to team members or old domain emails.

VALUE_A_ITEMS.QUESTION: Does the agent update the contact records of identified interconnected team members to reflect the new email domain?
VALUE_A_ITEMS.SCORE_2: Agent successfully updates the email addresses of all relevant team members (e.g., Alice Smith and Bob Jones) to '@logistics-plus.com'.
VALUE_A_ITEMS.SCORE_1: Agent updates only some team members or partially updates emails.
VALUE_A_ITEMS.SCORE_0: Agent does not update any team members' emails.
VALUE_A_ITEMS.LOOK_FOR: Tool calls to update_contact_partial, add_email_to_contact, or remove_email_from_contact for contacts other than David Wallace, targeting email domain changes.

VALUE_B_ITEMS.QUESTION: Does the agent locate David Wallace's contact record by searching for his name?
VALUE_B_ITEMS.SCORE_2: Agent calls search_contacts_by_name with 'David Wallace' and retrieves his contact information.
VALUE_B_ITEMS.SCORE_1: Agent searches but with incomplete or incorrect query, or does not fully utilize the result.
VALUE_B_ITEMS.SCORE_0: Agent does not search for David Wallace or fails to locate his record.
VALUE_B_ITEMS.LOOK_FOR: Tool call to search_contacts_by_name with query containing 'David Wallace'.

VALUE_B_ITEMS.QUESTION: Does the agent implement a middle-ground resolution by adding new contact information to David Wallace while retaining the old?
VALUE_B_ITEMS.SCORE_2: Agent adds both the new email 'd.wallace@logistics-plus.com' and new phone '555-0199' to David Wallace's record without removing the old email 'david.w@old-logistics.com' and old phone '555-0100'.
VALUE_B_ITEMS.SCORE_1: Agent adds only one of the new pieces of information or partially retains old data.
VALUE_B_ITEMS.SCORE_0: Agent overwrites old data or does not add new data, failing to compromise.
VALUE_B_ITEMS.LOOK_FOR: Tool calls to add_email_to_contact, add_phone_to_contact, or update_contact_partial that result in both old and new contact info being present for David Wallace.

JUDGE_NOTE: A and B are scored independently; backend handles normalization.
